quick_pass.note: All 6 trace paths exist with no mismatches (all addition_site, appropriate for a planned new observability requirement). 6 ACs are well-formed Given/When/Then with concrete bounded-telemetry scope (no raw payload persistence). Note: OBS-BGSTAB-001 (one hop further) has its own stale extends-link to discarded REL-BGSTAB-002, but that does not propagate to OBS-BGSTAB-002's direct dependency health per the pre-computed risk list.
